productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Country Eagle Red Shirt
description: CompositionRed, grey and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with a full front button placket, full hand cuff sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flap and embroidered branding on left arm, patch pocket on left chest and has a curved hemlineFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryWear your brand in style with this checked shirt from wrangler – the brand that has been clothing the world since 1947. The full arm sleeves allow you to roll it up for a complete casual feel, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
